message:
feat(abi): expand locale struct, improve resolver robustness, add mremap parameter

Locale (locale_abi.rs):
- Add 6 international currency fields to LConv struct: int_p_cs_precedes,
  int_p_sep_by_space, int_n_cs_precedes, int_n_sep_by_space,
  int_p_sign_posn, int_n_sign_posn — brings struct lconv into full
  POSIX compliance

Resolver (resolv_abi.rs):
- Graceful continue on invalid UTF-8 in /etc/hosts lookup instead of
  panicking
- Cast port correctly to u16 before endian conversion

Mmap (mmap_abi.rs):
- Add missing new_address parameter to mremap() signature for
  MREMAP_FIXED support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,6 +44,12 @@ static LCONV: LConv = LConv {
     n_sep_by_space: 127,
     p_sign_posn: 127,
     n_sign_posn: 127,
+    int_p_cs_precedes: 127,
+    int_p_sep_by_space: 127,
+    int_n_cs_precedes: 127,
+    int_n_sep_by_space: 127,
+    int_p_sign_posn: 127,
+    int_n_sign_posn: 127,
 };
 
 /// C-compatible `struct lconv`.
@@ -67,6 +73,12 @@ pub struct LConv {
     n_sep_by_space: c_char,
     p_sign_posn: c_char,
     n_sign_posn: c_char,
+    int_p_cs_precedes: c_char,
+    int_p_sep_by_space: c_char,
+    int_n_cs_precedes: c_char,
+    int_n_sep_by_space: c_char,
+    int_p_sign_posn: c_char,
+    int_n_sign_posn: c_char,
 }
 
 // SAFETY: LConv contains only static pointers and scalars, all read-only.
